name: filing_date
label: Filing Date
hint: Select filing date

name: patent_office
label: Jurisdiction / Patent Office
hint: Select the patent office or jurisdiction where the filing will be made

name: address_for_service
label: Address for Service
hint: Enter the local service address for receipt of patent office communications

name: application_type
label: Application Type
hint: Select type of patent application

name: international_application_number
label: International Application Number
hint: Enter PCT application number, e.g. PCT/IN2026/000123

name: international_filing_date
label: International Filing Date
hint: Select international filing date

name: wipo_publication_number
label: WIPO Publication Number
hint: Enter WIPO publication number for the PCT application

name: entity_fee_status
label: Small / Micro Entity Status
hint: Select fee-status category for government fee concessions

name: entity_status_certification
label: Entity Status Certification / Form Number
hint: Enter the certification, declaration, or form number used to claim reduced fees

name: assignee_details
label: Assignee Details
hint: Enter assignee details if rights are assigned

name: invention_title
label: Invention Title
hint: Enter title of invention

name: technical_field
label: Technical Field
hint: Define field of invention

name: background_of_invention
label: Background of Invention
hint: Describe existing problem and prior art

name: summary_of_invention
label: Summary of Invention
hint: Brief summary of invention

name: detailed_description
label: Detailed Description
hint: Explain invention in detail with embodiments

name: abstract
label: Abstract
hint: Short technical summary (150-300 words)

name: keywords
label: Keywords
hint: Enter keywords for search/classification

name: priority_claimed
label: Priority Claimed
hint: Is priority claimed from earlier filing?

fields.name: priority_country
fields.label: Priority Country
fields.hint: Enter country of the earlier filing

name: das_code
label: DAS Code
hint: Enter Digital Access Service code for electronic priority document retrieval

name: relation_to_parent
label: Relation to Parent Application
hint: Select if this filing is related to a parent application

name: parent_application_number
label: Parent Application Number
hint: Enter parent application number

name: parent_filing_date
label: Parent Filing Date
hint: Select parent filing date

name: publication_preference
label: Publication Preference
hint: Select publication type

name: examination_request
label: Request for Examination
hint: Is examination requested?

name: biological_material_disclosure
label: Biological Material Disclosure
hint: Enable if the invention involves biological material requiring deposit details

name: deposition_number
label: Deposition Number
hint: Enter biological material deposition number

name: international_depository_authority
label: Name of International Depository Authority
hint: Enter name of the recognized depository authority

name: agent_details
label: Patent Agent Details
hint: Enter patent agent or attorney details

name: registration_number
label: Agent Registration Number
hint: Enter the agent's patent office registration or enrollment number

name: declaration_of_inventorship
label: Declaration of Inventorship
hint: Confirm inventorship declaration

name: government_fee_details
label: Government Fee Details
hint: Mention filing fees paid
